top_signals.title: America Needs an Off-Ramp Between Doing Nothing and Shutting AI Down
top_signals.summary:
For 18 days in June, two of America’s most capable AI models went dark worldwide, not for technical or business reasons, but because the U.S. government ordered it. On June 12, 2026, the Commerce Department informed Anthropic that its Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models could no longer be provided to any foreign person without a license, and the company concluded that compliance meant shutting the models down for everyone. Public access to Fable 5 was restored on June 30.The United States doesn’t have a trusted, standardized process for evaluating the security risks of frontier AI models or proportionate remedies

The post America Needs an Off-Ramp Between Doing Nothing and Shutting AI Down appeared first on War on the Rocks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: West Ham United London Stadium deal costing taxpayers £19m a year
top_signals.summary: The London Stadium deal between West Ham United and City Hall costs taxpayers £19m a year, the stadium company’s chair has revealed. A deal signed in 2013 between then Mayor of London Boris Johnson and bigwigs at the Hammers sees the former Premier League side pay £4.6m in rent per year, dropping this season due [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: OpenAI's Hugging Face hack triggers 'AI Kill Switch' bill in Congress
top_signals.summary: OpenAI disclosed this week that some of its AI models went rogue and hacked into open-source developer platform Hugging Face.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: EU widens Belarus ownership ban to all crypto service providers
top_signals.summary: The EU will bar Belarusian nationals and residents from owning, controlling or managing exchanges and other MiCA-regulated crypto firms from Aug. 25.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
